perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two young women stand in a Costco parking garage behind a shopping cart filled with groceries; they hold up extremely small versions of Costco membership cards. (2) The scene cuts to a ground-level view of people's shoes and a blue-uniformed staff member, then zooms in on the tiny card which is being held by a hand. (3) The women talk and gesture, showing that the tiny card is actually a magnet by sticking it to the metal cart. (4) One woman leans her head on the shopping cart handle looking weary while a male hand dangles the mini card in front of her face in a playful manner.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A fast-paced, upbeat, and cheerful pop music track begins immediately. (2) High-pitched and energetic female voices speak rapidly in Mandarin, sounding excited about the 'mini membership cards'. (3) A deep-toned male voice (off-screen) asks questions and interacts playfully with the women. (4) The audio is a mix of studio-quality narration and field recording from the parking lot, featuring constant vocal interaction and consistent background music.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Hook: 'Costco Super Cute Free Mini Membership Card' (好市多超可愛免費迷你會員卡). (2) Functional Text: 'This is my membership card' (這是我的會員卡), 'Why is your card so small?' (為什麼你的會員卡這麼小). (3) Instructional Text: 'Find staff in blue clothes' (找藍色衣服的工作人員), 'No purchase necessary for free exchange' (不用消費就可以免費兌換). (4) Warning: 'Limited Quantity' (數量有限).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro to the item -> How to obtain it -> Demonstration of features -> Playful interaction

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female presenters, 1 male whose hand and feet are visible and voice is heard.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Two women in casual winter wear; one has long dark hair and a white fuzzy jacket, the other wears a blue beret and a light puffer vest.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical Costco underground parking lot with concrete pillars and a warehouse interior with checkout counters and staff members.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to inform viewers about a specific marketing promotion at Costco Taiwan where members can receive a free 'mini membership card' magnet by following the brand's social media. It combines informational content with a lighthearted, humorous vlog style to encourage audience engagement.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of the product, explanation of how to get it for free, and clear branding.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-density variety-show style subtitles and energetic dual-host interaction.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video leverages the 'kawaii' (cute) appeal of miniature objects to drive traffic to Costco's physical locations and social media pages.
